appShell.serverUnreachable: Can't reach the server. Make sure the backend is running, then refresh.
appShell.verifyBannerText: Confirm your email to secure your account.
appShell.verifyResent: Verification email sent — check your inbox.

hero.subtitle: Every other tracker hands you a formula and hopes for the best. VitaForge logs your food and weight, then back-calculates your real maintenance from the trend — so your target is built from facts, not a guess.
hero.noStrings: No ads. No paywall. No credit card.

method.title: Most apps guess. VitaForge measures.
method.step1Body: Enter your stats and get a starting calorie & macro target from the standard formula — the same one most apps stop at.
method.step2Body: Track what you eat and step on the scale. Day-to-day noise is smoothed into a real weight trend, not a single jumpy number.
method.step3Body: VitaForge reads your actual intake against the trend and back-calculates the calories that truly hold your weight — then builds the goal from that.

facts.foodsLabel: foods with barcode lookup, from USDA FoodData Central
facts.priceLabel: free forever — no ads, no subscription, no upsell
facts.methodLabel: explained — VitaForge shows the method, never a black box

features.diaryBody: Search a real catalog of hundreds of thousands of foods, scan a barcode, save favourites, copy a whole day forward.
features.trendBody: An exponential moving average turns the daily scale chaos into a clean line you can actually act on.
features.calibrationBody: The core of the product: your maintenance is measured from your own data and re-checked as you go, with a safe rate of change built in.
features.coachingBody: In-day guidance on hitting your protein and staying on target — and no blame after an overage, just the next right step.

cta.title: See your number in under a minute
cta.body: No sign-up to try. Run the calculator, then create a free account if you want VitaForge to start measuring your real maintenance.

try.title: Try it — no account needed
try.subtitle: Get a starting calorie & macro target. Nothing is saved.
try.errorFallback: Could not compute — check your inputs
try.rateHint: A steep rate gets clamped to a healthy range automatically.
try.explainMiddle: — a starting guess from your stats ({{maintenance}} kcal maintenance). It's where most apps stop. VitaForge keeps going: log a couple of weeks and it back-calculates your
try.explainAfter: from your weight trend, then builds the target from facts instead of a formula.
try.rateClampedNote: Your chosen rate was clamped to a safe range.
try.createAccountCta: Create a free account to track it
try.freeNote: No ads. No paywall. Always free.
try.tabTargetHint: Turn your stats into a calorie & macro target.
try.tabTrendHint: See how the smoothed trend cuts through daily weight noise.
try.tabCalibrationHint: Watch your real maintenance get measured from intake + weight.

dashboard.calibratingNote: Your norm is preliminary. {{collected}}/{{window}} clean days collected — eat at maintenance and weigh daily.
dashboard.rateClamped: Rate clamped to a healthy maximum.

diary.emptyHint: Add your first item, or copy yesterday.

custom.title: New custom food
custom.created: Custom food created — find it in Search
custom.name: Name

weight.title: Weight trend
weight.emptyHint: Log your morning weight to start the trend.
weight.trendMinHint: Log at least two days to see a trend.
weight.weightHint: Weigh first thing in the morning for the cleanest trend.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.subtitle: Save a meal once, then log the whole thing in one tap.
recipes.noComponents: No foods yet — add some below.
recipes.emptyHint: Build a recipe from foods you eat together, then log it in one tap.

trends.title: Trends
trends.subtitle: Read the pattern, not the day — your weekly and monthly averages.
trends.emptyHint: Log your food and weight for a few days and your averages show up here.
trends.nothingLogged: Nothing logged in this window yet.
trends.paceMaintain: Your weight is moving {{actual}}/wk — aiming to hold steady.
trends.paceHint: Actual rate is read from your smoothed weight trend over the last month.
trends.goalNoTarget: Set a goal weight to track progress and project your finish.
trends.goalNoData: Add a couple of weigh-ins and we'll project your goal.
trends.goalReached: You've reached your goal weight — nice work.
trends.goalOnTrack: {{remaining}} to go · on track for {{date}} (~{{weeks}} wk)
trends.goalStalled: {{remaining}} to go · the trend is flat right now, so no ETA yet.
trends.goalOffTrack: {{remaining}} to go · your weight is moving away from the goal.

calibration.title: Calibration
calibration.intro: Instead of trusting a formula, we measure your real maintenance from what you actually ate and how your weight trend moved — then build your goal from that.
calibration.cleanDayExplain: A clean day has both a food log and a weigh-in.
calibration.runCalcHint: Run a calculation to see your real numbers here.
calibration.toastCalibrated: Calibrated — target switched to real maintenance

settings.title: Settings
settings.rateHint: Steep rates are clamped to a healthy maximum.
settings.targetWeightHint: Optional — powers progress & ETA on Trends.
settings.dataHint: Download everything we hold about you, or delete your account for good.
settings.deleteConfirmHint: This erases your profile, diary, weights, calibration and custom foods. It cannot be undone.
settings.deleteError: Could not delete the account — check your password
settings.themeHint: Light, dark, or follow your system.

security.title: Password
security.hint: Change your password. You'll need your current one to confirm.
security.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

params.title: App-level parameters (§6)
params.subtitle: Defaults for everyone. Per-user overrides still take precedence. Edit a value to override it app-wide.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to continue your plan.
auth.registerSubtitle: Two minutes to set up. Then we calibrate.
auth.name: Name
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.heroFootnote: Built on the RP / Israetel calibration method.
auth.point1: Measure your real maintenance, then build the cut from facts
auth.point2: Smoothed weight trend — no panic over water weight
auth.point3: Every feature free. No ads, no paywall.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
auth.forgotSent: If that email is registered, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetDone: Password updated. Redirecting you to log in…
auth.resetNoToken: This reset link is missing or invalid. Request a new one.
auth.verifyOk: Your email is confirmed. You're all set.
auth.verifyError: This verification link is invalid or has expired.

onboarding.title: Set up your profile
onboarding.subtitle: We'll compute a starting norm — then refine it from real data.
onboarding.targetRateHint: A steep rate gets clamped to a healthy range automatically.
onboarding.calibrationNote: You won't cut right away. For the first ~2 weeks you eat at maintenance and weigh daily so we can measure your real burn — then the deficit is built on facts, not a formula.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: That section failed to load. You can try again — your data is safe.

tryTrend.summary: Over these two weeks the trend moved
tryTrend.summaryTail: — that's the real change, noise removed.
tryTrend.needMore: Add at least two weigh-ins to see the trend.
tryTrend.editHint: These are sample morning weigh-ins — edit any to see the trend react.
tryTrend.explain: Water and glycogen swing the scale 1–2 kg a day. The smoothed trend line shows where your weight is actually going, so you don't panic over a single morning.

tryCalib.inputsHint: Tell us what you ate and how your weight moved — we back out your real burn.
tryCalib.explain: If you ate this much and your weight moved that way, your real burn must be this. That measured number — not a formula guess — is what we build your target from.
tryCalib.needData: Enter your two weeks to see the estimate.

siteFooter.blurb: Calibration-first calorie & macro tracking. Measure your real maintenance, then build from facts. Free, no ads, no paywall.
siteFooter.madeWith: Built on the RP / Israetel calibration method.
